name: Cloud Peak Energy Inc.
description: Cloud Peak Energy Inc. is one of the largest coal producers in the United States and the Powder River Basin. The company owns and operates three surface coal mines: the Antelope Coal Mine and Cordero Rojo Coal Mine in Wyoming, and the Spring Creek Coal Mine in Montana. Cloud Peak Energy primarily produces low-sulfur, subbituminous coal, which is sold to domestic and international electric utilities for electricity generation.
